# curation-swarm — data license

**Source:** first-party — generated by HanjaKey's own LLM subagent swarm (spec 005 M2). NOT third-party.
**License:** MIT — same as the project `LICENSE`. LLM-generated short factual labels (preference tiers)
carry only thin copyright, so this is our own data and stays MIT.

`tiers.txt` is the per-(reading, Hanja) **preference tier + rank** for single-syllable candidate ordering,
format `읽기:한자:티어:글로스`, file-ordered per reading by `(tier, rank)`. Built by `scripts/build_tiers.py`
from the swarm outputs in `docs/specs/005-candidate-quality/swarm-raw/`, hardened against swarm glitches:
every row is validated against the canonical `hanja.txt`, invalid/hallucinated entries are dropped, and
missing canonical entries fall back to tier 3.

- Generated: 2026-06-21. 26,988 rows (352 readings with >20 candidates).
- Pipeline + provenance: `docs/specs/005-candidate-quality/`.
